args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

Benchmark artifact for Hono helper modules.

## src/helper/factory/index.ts

- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, CreateHandlers (overloads for 1-10 handlers)
- Reads as: TypeScript interface definitions, imports from '../../hono', '../../types'
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Factory helper provides type-safe handler composition with overloads for 1 to 10 handlers, enabling clean API pattern matching in Express-style chains.

## src/helper/route/index.ts

- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath
- Reads as: Type imports from '../../context', '../../types', runtime constants from '../../request/constants'
- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Route inspection utilities for retrieving matched routes, registered paths, and base route paths from request context with example usage patterns.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts

- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, WSReadyState, WSContextInit, SendOptions, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent, WebSocketHelperDefineContext, WebSocketHelperDefineHandler, defineWebSocketHelper
- Reads as: Type imports from '../../context', '../../types', '../../utils/http-status'
- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: WebSocket helper provides event listener types, context class for message sending, and defineWebSocketHelper factory function for upgrading requests to WebSocket connections.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts

- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: Runtime imports from '../../context', '../../utils/cookie'
- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Cookie management utilities for reading, writing, and deleting cookies with support for signed cookies, __Secure- and __Host- prefixes, and prefix options.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts

- Main exports or names: Testing module for Hono client utilities
- Reads as: Type imports from '../../client/types', '../../types', '../../utils/types'
- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Testing helper exports client and schema type utilities for writing integration tests and client-side request simulation in Hono applications.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts

- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents

## src/helper/css/index.ts

- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/css/index.test.ts

## src/helper/css/common.ts

- Main exports or names: CSS utility functions for class generation and escaping
- Reads as: Standalone utility file for both server and client CSS operations
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Common CSS utilities providing class name sanitization, slug generation, and whitespace handling for consistent CSS helper behavior across runtimes.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts

- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: Runtime imports from '../../http-exception', '../../utils/headers'
- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.test.ts
- Safe summary: Proxy fetch wrapper with RFC 9110 compliance mode, hop-by-hop header filtering, and custom fetch support for forwarding requests through proxy servers.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts

- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.test.ts
